name: Feature request / new game idea
about: Suggest a new game or an improvement to an existing one

---

**Is this a new game or an improvement to an existing game?**

**Describe the idea**
A clear description of the game/mechanic.

**Inspirations (optional)**
Classic 90s games or other references this draws from.

**Are you offering to implement it?**
Yes / No / Maybe with guidance
